message:
feat: add rotating tips to console loading screen (#5900)

Display helpful tips on the watchdog "Compiling backend" loading
screen so users learn about console features while waiting for
startup. 15 tips rotate every 8 seconds with a fade transition.

Fixes #5899

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
